violations.text: The grout in the ware washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Various food was observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was relocated to walk-in New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The 2 lowboy units in the kitchen area were observed unable to hold an ambient temperature of 41 degrees. Technician was on site at the time of inspection. Units must not be used until repaired. PIC to monitor temperatures of food in unit daily once unit is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The tiles in the ware washing area is in poor repair. The grout was observed with pooling water. Grout to be repaired. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
Establishment did not have documentation for cheese variance on file. Inspector provided establishment with documentation for cheese variance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

Employees beverage was observed being stored in refrigerator with boxes of food product. Employees personal items may not be stored with food meant for retail sale. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

The frappuccino beverage cooler located in the front kitchen area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Bags of coffee product was moved to colder refrigeration. Unit taken out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
The tiles in walk in cooler area is in poor repair(broken tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
